title: pouteria rigida subsp. tomentosa
intro: Pouteria rigida subsp. tomentosa, also known as the Tomentosa Pouteria, is a plant species belonging to the family Sapotaceae. Traditionally, it is used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, Pouteria rigida subsp. tomentosa is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
